name: wear-os-development
description: Wear OS smartwatch development with Kotlin + Jetpack Compose. 1 specialized agent, 2 slash commands, and 5 skills covering Blueprint AI planning for watch apps, Compose for Wear OS (Material 3 Expressive, ScalingLazyColumn/TransformingLazyColumn), Tiles + ProtoLayout + Complications + Ongoing Activity, Health Services (passive monitoring, ExerciseClient, MeasureClient), and on-watch data + security (DataStore over deprecated EncryptedSharedPreferences, Android Keystore, Data Layer API, battery-aware background work). Grounded in official Android 2026 guidance.
